case_title: MARCIA GUTIERREZ et al VS. LAURIE O' BRIEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $933.00 FILED BY GUTIERREZ, MARCIA MARINKO, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT O' BRIEN, LAURIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED JAN-08-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT O' BRIEN, LAURIE
PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT FILED. SAME WAS ALREADY ON FILE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, MARCIA MARINKO, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O' BRIEN, LAURIE $12.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $72.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS $180.00- DAMAGES FOR THE LOSS OF PLAINTIFF'S I-PHONE, OFFSET BY $168- FOR 2/5'S OF THE TOWING CHARGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, MARCIA MARINKO, PAUL ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS, W/AUTHORIZATION LETTER FROM OTHER PLAINTIFF PAUL MARINKO.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
